line_1: The ingenious strain of torturing art could trill!
line_2: Its praise he left to those who, at their will,

line_1: And conscious slumbers own the trill;
line_2: Her notes my wak'ning senses fill,

line_1: He, only knows adroitly thus to trill.
line_2: What Bard but DELLA CRUSCA boasts such skill?
